design_philosophy: High-end Dubai restaurant aesthetic. Classic luxury, refined typography, elegant gold accents, sophisticated palette. Avoid generic tech-UI. The interface must feel like a premium printed menu or an exclusive invitation.

headings.usage: H1, H2, Logo, large display numbers

body.usage: Paragraphs, buttons, small labels, UI elements

headings.usage: H1, H2, large text in RTL mode

body.usage: Paragraphs, buttons, small labels in RTL mode

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto w-full px-6 py-12 min-h-screen flex flex-col relative
spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: gap-8 or gap-12 between major sections
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain a classic, sharp print feel

language_toggle.style: bg-transparent border border-[#E6E2D8] text-[#2C2A29] px-4 py-2 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors duration-300 backdrop-blur-sm
language_toggle.interaction: Smooth crossfade when switching languages. Toggles 'dir=rtl' attribute.

waiter_selection.card_style: flex flex-col items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer p-4 border border-transparent transition-all duration-300
waiter_selection.avatar: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#F5F3ED] flex items-center justify-center text-[#7A7571] overflow-hidden

rating_stars.star_style: w-10 h-10 sm:w-12 sm:h-12 cursor-pointer transition-transform duration-200 hover:scale-110
rating_stars.note: NO EMOJIS. Pure SVG geometric stars.

feedback_textarea.style: w-full bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-[#E6E2D8] px-0 py-3 text-base text-[#2C2A29] placeholder-[#7A7571] focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#D4AF37] transition-colors resize-none

submit_button.style: w-full bg-[#2C2A29] text-white py-4 mt-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] transition-colors duration-300

thank_you_modal.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-[#FDFBF7]/95 backdrop-blur-md z-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center
thank_you_modal.icon: lucide-react Check icon inside a delicate gold circle
thank_you_modal.heading: font-serif text-3xl mb-4 text-[#2C2A29]

owner_dashboard.access: Hidden text at the very bottom of the page: text-[10px] text-[#E6E2D8] hover:text-[#7A7571] cursor-pointer
owner_dashboard.th: border-b border-[#E6E2D8] py-4 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#7A7571]

suspended_view.style: min-h-screen bg-[#FDFBF7] flex items-center justify-center p-6 text-center

animations.page_load: Fade in with subtle slide up (Framer Motion: opacity: 0->1, y: 10->0)
animations.language_switch: Opacity crossfade to prevent harsh layout jumps

background_image.usage: Use as a very subtle, highly blurred and desaturated fixed background overlay (opacity 5%) to give texture, NOT as a clear photo. If it interferes with text readability, fall back to solid #FDFBF7.

logic_instructions_to_main_agent: Implement everything in a single React file if requested, or clean modular files.
Use standard Lucide React icons for the avatar placeholder and stars.
Manage state for: currentLanguage ('en' | 'ar'), selectedWaiter (id), rating (1-5), feedback (string), view ('customer' | 'dashboard' | 'suspended').
Handle logic: On submit, if rating >= 4, window.open('https://maps.google.com/?q=GAIA+Dubai', '_blank'). If rating <= 3, show Thank You modal.
Mock backend by saving to localStorage (e.g., 'gaia_reviews').
Password for dashboard is '1234' (prompt via native window.prompt or a styled modal).
RTL: When language is 'ar', set standard HTML `dir='rtl'` on the main wrapper and swap font classes.
Include Google Fonts links for Cormorant Garamond, Manrope, Cairo, and Tajawal in the index.html or import them in CSS.
